metadata.title: OpenCell Thermal-Mechanical Energy System: Zero-Electric Cooling and Direct Farm Power
metadata.description: An open-source thermal energy system providing zero-electric cooling and direct mechanical power for farms and homes. Uses OpenCell Aerocement for solar thermal capture, subterranean cold loops for passive refrigeration, and Stirling/Rocket Mass engines for mechanical work transmission.
metadata.notes: This project is licensed under CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0. Commercial derivatives require licensing agreement with the OpenCell Project. Physics validated through theoretical modeling and prototype testing.
